payload.title: Rewrite README getting-started around the one-command flow
payload.description: Once cargo trust build + project-level strict config land, collapse the README. Replace 'Using strict source from cargo' (the export RUSTC_WRAPPER/RUSTDOC block) and the dual-activation explanation with: install cargo-trust, add strict=true to Cargo.toml, run `cargo trust build`. Keep the single-file `trust check/build/lower` flow for quick trials. Coordinate with RT-56 (README rewrite for first-time visitors) so the two don't conflict. Depends on the subcmd + config stories actually shipping.
